ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL IS GRANTED. CGC-18-276709 AND CGC-21-276916 ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL. CGC-18-276709 SHALL BE THE LEAD CASE. SUBSEQUENT DOCUMENTS MUST BE FILED ONLY IN THE LEAD CASE AND ALL DOCUMENTS FILED IN THE CONSOLIDATED CASE MUST INCLUDE THE CAPTION AND CASE NUMBER OF THE LEAD CASE, FOLLOWED BY THE CASE NUMBER OF THE OTHER CONSOLIDATED CASE. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-276709 WITH CASE CGC-21-276916
Off Calendar Mar-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs Michael Sciume and Sonseah Sciume.
Carmen Sandgren of MANNING, GROSS & MASSENBURG (949-892-4700), appearing for defendant Temporary Plant Cleaners.

RULING:
Not argued and tentative ruling modified as follows: Plaintiffs' Motion for Order to Consolidate Actions for All Purposes Including Trial is GRANTED. The Opposition filed by United States Fidelity And Guaranty Company was withdrawn. Case Nos. CGC-18-276709 and CGC-21-276916 are consolidated for all purposes including trial. Henceforth, case no. CGC-18-276709 shall be the lead case. Subsequent documents must be filed only in the lead case and all documents filed in the consolidated case must include the caption and case number of the lead case, followed by the case number of the other consolidated case. (CRC 3.3350.) The trial setting conference set for February 17, 2022 in case no. CGC-21-276916 was continued to April 21, 2022. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
